---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Propose an idea or integration for G3H
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I'm frustrated when I try to integrate Discord webhooks...")

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain the integration, node behavior, UI changes, or backend actions you'd like to propose.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 🎯 Additional Benefits
How will this feature benefit other users? What workflows will it enable?

## 🔍 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup drawings, or API documentation references about the feature request here.
